admin.title: Admin
admin.browseTournamentsSub: Open, edit, or inspect any tournament
admin.browseUsersSub: Names, emails, roles — tap for ID
admin.tournamentListHint: View opens the event. Edit changes details as admin.
admin.usersListHint: Tap a user to edit profile and role.
admin.editTournamentHint: Changes apply immediately for all players.
admin.deleteTournamentAdminConfirm: Permanently delete "%{name}" and all its teams and entries?

auth.webSignInOnly: Sign in is only available in the app. Install Matchpoint from the Play Store to get started.
auth.googleNotConfigured: Google sign-in is not configured. Add EXPO_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID to .env
auth.googleTokenMissing: Could not get token from Google
auth.appleTokenMissing: Apple did not return an identity token
auth.signUpFailed: Sign up failed. Please try again.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.resetFailed: Failed to send reset email. Try again.
auth.resetEmailSent: If that email is registered, you'll receive a reset link shortly.
auth.resetInstructions: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

profile.deleteAccountMessage: This permanently deletes your account and your tournament entries. Teams you were on are dissolved for other players. Tournaments with no organizers left are cancelled. This cannot be undone.
profile.deleteAccountFailed: Could not delete your account. Check your connection and try again.
profile.displayNameHint: How you appear in teams. Defaults to first name if empty.

tournaments.name: Name
tournaments.endDate: End date (optional, same day if empty)
tournaments.missingFields: Please fill in name, start date, and location.
tournaments.invalidDates: End date must be on or after start date.
tournaments.invalidMaxTeams: Max teams must be between 2 and 64.
tournaments.mustBeSignedIn: You must be signed in to create a tournament.

tournamentDetail.genderRequired: Set your gender in Profile to join tournaments.
tournamentDetail.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "%{name}"? This cannot be undone.
tournamentDetail.removeTeamConfirm: Dissolve "%{name}"? Both players become free agents.
tournamentDetail.leaveTournamentConfirm: Leave this tournament? You can rejoin with the invite link if it is still open.

team.alreadyInTeam: You can only be in one team per tournament.
team.genderRequired: You need to set your gender in your profile to create a team.

entries.noEntries: No entries yet. Join a tournament to get started.

inviteLink.invalidLinkSubtitle: This tournament link may be expired or invalid.
inviteLink.webOpenInApp: If you have Matchpoint installed, use “Open in app” so the tournament opens in the app. Otherwise install from the Play Store.
inviteLink.webCopyHint: Or copy this link and open it on your phone: %{url}
inviteLink.alreadyJoined: You've already joined. View tournament details.
inviteLink.invitedToJoin: You've been invited to join this tournament.
inviteLink.genderRequiredProfile: Set your gender in Profile to join tournaments.

editProfile.title: Edit profile
editProfile.genderRequired: Gender is required to join tournaments.
